abilities.name: limber
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be paralyzed. If a Pokémon is paralyzed and acquires this ability, its paralysis is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's limber body prevents it from being paralyzed.

abilities.name: technician
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves have 1.5× their power if their base power is 60 or less. This includes moves of variable power, such as Hidden Power and Magnitude, when their power is 60 or less. Helping Hand's power boost is taken into account for any move, as is Defense Curl's power boost for Rollout.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.

abilities.name: unnerve
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
abilities.effect: Opposing Pokémon cannot eat held Berries while this Pokémon is in battle. Affected Pokémon can still use Bug Bite or Pluck to eat a target's Berry.
abilities.flavorText: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.
